title: oxalis roselata
intro: Oxalis roselata, also known as the rose-sorrel or woodland sorrel, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the Oxalis genus. This perennial plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating urinary tract issues and kidney stones due to its high concentration of oxalic acid and other compounds. The health benefits of Oxalis roselata include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as a natural diuretic to promote urine production. Oxalis roselata can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
